channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Should I buy more BTC or altcoins? — 52 replies — 163.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should I buy more BTC or altcoins?

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-04-05 03:49 UTC

OP

BTC is steady and battle-tested. Altcoins can go up more but are riskier.

>You buying more BTC like Saylor does or alts like ETH and SOL this cycle?

Early replies (first 3)

62059768
I'm going all in on SOL

62059809
>>62059007
Allocating a small portion to CreditScoreProtocol * com can generate substantial wealth

62061375
>>62059768
Why all in on SOL?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62067162
When pump MSTR saylor?

62067166
>>62059007
>Should I buy more BTC or altcoins?
Probably not

62067204
>>62059007
where we are going we won't need bitchcoins

62067554
>>62066997
getting 1% staking is not good at all

62067657
>>62067204
I need Bitcoin. 100 btc

62069260
>>62067554
It’s a lot better than just holding your BTC with no return. More people should explore how BTCFi works now.

62069267
>>62065091
You're just doing the right thing anon.

62070210
>>62061834
Never heard of that anon

62071949
>>62069260
IF YOU'RE TALKING DEFI. ID GO FOR ETHEREUM AND SOLANA

62071968
Pls stop saylor. Stop

62071975
>>62067166
Do it eyyyyyy

62072569
>>62071949
Yeah ETH and Solana are solid, but only ~1% of BTC is in DeFi. Lots to explore, like Trustless Bitcoin Vaults, which will let BTC earn yield, be used as collateral, or participate in lending. That’s just getting started anon.

62072572
>>62065610
Are you also diversifying?

62072782
>>62059007
>Why nobody is talking xrp?

62072785
>>62067204
zero

62072829
>>62065610

62073188
>>62065656
He knows

62073628
>>62072782
stablecoin

62073641
>>62059007
if you guys could buy as much bitcoin as you can, driving the price up to and over $96,000 so that I can make my exit, that would be great. thanks a bunch.

62073652
>>62073641
You're just coward to hold and wait till 5 years

62073673
>>62072569
Defi hacks are everywhere

62073687
>>62073641
For God sake

62075889
>>62066497
I dont know. Maybe your trump coin will lol

62076395
>>62059007
quantum threats good luck

62076433
>>62059007
BTC or nothing, smart anons are staking and just waiting for the pump.

62076441
>>62067554
>>62071949
ignore the jeet shilling his staking btc scam. He shills it in every thread.
Are you guys really that stupid to not realize this? The jeet was shilling some privacy defi scam before, forgot the name. It's probably some LLM bot tbqh

62076475
BTC will hit $70000 before the end of today, buy now.

Trust me.

62076605
>>62076441
Wtf is that jeez

62076963
>>62072569
Only a few BTCFi projects like bablylon can boast of TBVs, others are still offering wrapped BTC staking

62078281
>>62076475
Trust me lol

item.title: Going to Pattaya after being laid off? — 51 replies — 101.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Going to Pattaya after being laid off?

Open thread • Replies: 51 • Updated: 2026-04-05 03:38 UTC

OP

33
House fully paid
Will be terminated in July 2026
120K in savings
No career (only issue here)

After 5 years being a good goy i got laid off and my contract will stop in July 2026

Should I allow myself 2-3 months in Pattaya to relax or should I "careermax" trying to get a new job immediately?

Resume gap I don't really care because a friend can say i work for his company during this time

im a junior cloud engineer (yes at 33 lol) and would like to get a certification like AZ-104 to be able to be hired as a Cloud engineer or Senior Cloud engineer when i come back home after that

What do you think?

PS: My gf is being very annoying about that but Im ready to go without her if she keeps nagging, FYI she is 100% remote and Pattaya is a comfy place if you stay away from naughty areas

Early replies (first 3)

62070612
>>62070405
https://youtu.be/sbcZzT8CExA

62070641
>>62070612
Yes this town

62070857
>>62070405
>Pattaya is a comfy place
no, its gross

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62074389
>>62072697
>I have + 300 bodycount of white women
wow thats like a prostitute a week for 6 years!

62074398
>>62074389
i started at 13 im 33

>>62074363
thank you

>>62074237
i agree with you

62074566
>>62074237
>tyrones sloppy seconds
>yes please
kek lmao even

62074789
>>62074566
most chicks don't fuck blacks. You're falling for jewish propaganda

62074797
>>62074789
>roastie whore told you a thing and you believed her
oh you sweet summer child

62074869
>>62074789
Most chicks will fuck anyone with enough money. Which are usually not blacks.

62074985
How much do ladyboys cost in pattaya?

62075459
>>62070405
This is a path to failure. You think this is like getting it out of your system, but really, it gets it into your system, you will start this shit then time travel to age 55 and have nothing, no family, no children, nothing but some diseases, you will have nutted in a bunch of whores.
Super fulfilling.

62075566
>>62074398
Did you get a plaque congratulating for 300 and been telling your gf/wife since then that its for bowling?

62075629
>>62074237
>rather have a 30 year old
Said no man ever.
Roastie hands wrote this.

62075633
>>62070405
>PS: My gf is being very annoying about that but Im ready to go without her if she keeps nagging, FYI she is 100% remote and Pattaya is a comfy place if you stay away from naughty areas

>My gf is being very annoying
they all are
>ready to go without her
you're making the mistake I made in threatening to move without EX gf's full support. thought I could spearhead an expedition, if you will. No. everything will fall apart.
>she is 100% remote
she's not gonna do it even if work allows her and it'll save her a million bucks on rent per minute

62075687
>>62072028
no, the rural villagers are so poor they send their daughters into the city to be prostitutes

62075985
>>62070405
>My gf
Why would you go live in the gooner capital with a western foid in tow? Either ditch her or go somewhere else like Da Nang or Ho Chi Minh.

62076193
>>62075459
>if you go to pattaya for 2 months you will end up alone at 55

62076204
When oil hits 200 a barrel, SEA will be hit the hardest. I can't even imagine retiring in a literal pro town with girls that have bodies of 12 year old boys and have taken a mile of Indian cock. Fucking pathetic.

62076290
>>62076204
>mile of Indian cock.
3 inch dicks can't ruin vaginas Ramjeetdastinkamiya.

62076296
Try to get a job while you are still employed. The best way to get a new job is to have a job. Not being employed gives HR the ick.

62076309
>>62070405
I know what kind of man you are

62076421
>>62076309
You cant stop me from enjoying tight Thai teens you fuckin dork

62077483
>>62070405

Why aren't you moving there? I'm in a similar situation, but with no GF. Get DTV visa, work from there, live like a king. I'm a neet, so not brave enough to be a freelancer.

62077491
>>62072511

>creampies
>raw

Are STDs another jewish psyop?

62077502
>>62072697
Why tf would you go to Pattaya of all places then you retard?

62077556
>>62073426
>>62073426
X2

62077669
>>62077491
Yes and no. Its virtually impossible to get aids if you're a straight male. Even if you fuck a girl with aids unless you do anal and have abrasions on your dick its very unlikely you will get it. Oral herpes is another matter if you fuck around enough, not even with pros but just any women you are basically guaranteed to get it at some point but its also kind of a nothing burger its an occasional inconvenience at most so long as you are relatively healthy. Most of the other stuff is just bacterial infections that can be quickly and permanently cured with antibiotics and prevented entirely just by pissing after sex and washing your dick not to mention avoiding grody bitches.

62077688
Youre gonna die of food poisoning from a gutter oil food cart OP

62077697
>>62070405
>Pattaya is a comfy place if you stay away from naughty areas
Sex tourism is literally the only reason anyone would ever goes to Pattaya. If you want a relaxing beach holiday around regular people there are a ton of other options in SEA

62077700
I went to Thailand twice in my early 30s. Bangkok and Pattaya. I recommend going once, the first time was legendary, the second time it didn't really do much for me anymore at it was just sad.

62077827
>>62077669
this guy is a complete fucking moron outside of his hiv dismissal, which is somewhat accurate, ignore him. All bacterial STDs are approaching anti-biotic resistant status and some have no visible/noticeable symptoms, but can cause you serious health problems long-term.

Any hooker who lets you fuck her raw, lets most of her clients fuck her raw, and the almost all of the nastiest, filthiest subhuman males alive, pay for hookers, so do plenty of normal guys sure, but just keep that in mind.

62078089
>>62077827
It's like how you always hear of person 1837383 winning the lottery but never all the people that played their whole lives but didn't wint.

You don't hear of persons 1-1837382 getting terrible STDs because, instead of posting on 4chan, they're now dealing with their STD

62078268
>>62070405
Get another job now and have 3+ kids you fool

62076912

62076916

he's right though. The Scrum Masters are in trouble, so we need an emergency TACO and bailout.

62076922

62077003

Yeah, bottom is in!

62077224

62077248

62077597

item.title: Renting 38% of net pay in VHCOL — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Renting 38% of net pay in VHCOL

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-05 04:04 UTC

OP

Got a job paying ~12k net in VHCOL city. If I stay at the job, my income will steadily increase. It is impossible to find anything within decent commutable distance for less than 4k in that area that's not a complete run down shit hole or a 300sqft studio. I found a place for 4.6k that I really like but it will be 38% of my net pay (exc. utilities).

I know this goes against the usual PF advice, but I value my living space a lot and after working 70-80hrs the last thing I want is be depressed in some shitty apartment. On the other hand, I'm sacrificing so much of my time to give a ton of it away to the landlord. Thoughts?

Early replies (first 3)

62078197
bump

62078200
>>62078160
if your commute is over 1.25 hours then just do it. ive been in ur same shoes didnhalf commute half live next to work and ten years later now i dont regret renting nearby.

commute absolutely kills your soul

62078205
well, it's $4.6k/month down the drain. only you can decide if it's worth it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078208
God damn thats a lot. Just rent a shitbox. Burning 50k a year just for rent is killing your long term prosperity and will just delay retirement

62078211
Live in a shared 2 bedroom 1 bathroom house for less money. High rent eats your savings and commuting eats your time which is worse. If you are young then go for 4 roommates 1 bathroom and have fun partying with your roommates.
> t. lived in a shared 2 bed 1 bath house for years until roommate got tired of listening to me jerkin it and started slamming doors, then i moved out to a ~400sf studio

62078215
What job / industry?

62078265
>>62078160
Seems to be a lot of room between supreme luxury penthouse and shitbox. Landlords are generally amenable to you fixing things up so just focus on the area. The neighbors and that.

62078277
>working 70-80hrs
You're a wagie who will barely be home except to sleep. Just rent a cheap room to sleep in.

62078295
>>62078160
SF? NYC? The price tag is worth it if you have both leisure time and disposable income to enjoy them.

Considering the “70-80” hour work weeks, that’s unsustainable. If you do that more than once a year, you’ll eventually want to throw yourself off the balcony of the nicest penthouse $12k could afford. Your goal in life with a salary is to work as little as possible.

Yes, any commute is terrible. If you’re taking public transit in those two cities, it’s doable to live in an affordable area. I credit great public transit for giving me time to study and let my mind wander early in my career as a tech professional. An extra hour in your work day isn’t going to be worse than having no savings.

Here’s my warning - coastal high pressure industries like tech, law, and finance are churn and burn. They promise dreams, drain the youth and vitality, then kick the once-eager husks to the curb once a pulse of resistance is felt. I have seen many people fall from grace and unsuccessfully cope with drugs, women, flashy cars, nice apartments, and all of those markers of a successful life. Save money to prepare for layoffs and your next move. Don’t be a sucker and spend your life in a VHCOL without getting all you can.

item.title: Give it to me straight /biz/ — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Give it to me straight /biz/

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-04-05 04:07 UTC

OP

I DCA $4 of BTC, $1 LINK, $1 XLM every day.

I currently have about
>0.02 BTC
>2,000 XRP
>2,000 XLM
>10 LINK
I have miscellaneous amounts of other crypto, but nothing worth putting in this thread unless it 1000x's. I do have a fat stack of PEPE tho.

Is the next 5 years going to pump my wallet to at least 100k? I just want enough that I can put a hefty down payment on a house, so I can let my elderly dog live out her last few years in a yard. If not, what should I do with my paycheck?

Early replies (first 3)

62078123
you need to save more, son

the world is divided into two groups. Those that have assets, and those that have a couple potatoes and a dream.

62078134
>>62078123
I am trying, I live in a very expensive state. I'm looking to move to a more affordable state, so far TN is the best looking option. That would help me save an additional 500 per month at least.

62078148
>>62078134
good. you have to love poverty so much that the cruel, ironic universe makes you wealthy

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62078170
Youre not getting to 100k with chump change. Those days are gone, sorry to break it to you.

62078291
>>62078088
You are a retard for holding .2 BTC. If you put that all into link you’ll have close to 2,000 link which is going to easily be a make it stack by 2030. Link could literally dildo to $100 on any given day. And you’ll immediately have 200k. And it’ll probably be $3000 by 2030

62078299
>>62078291
I can't tell if this is fuddie irony anymore I'm so bvckbroken

62073368

62073383

Actually I get to work at 7:30

62073473

62073488

62073491
>>62073323
Didn't think so Jeff, Easter Monday is next week. I'll be celebrating the resurrection of my Lord and Saviour, so the power of Christ compels you to piss of..

62073515
>>62073323

62073532
>>62073364
>>62073380
>>62073383
I hope you faggots die in a fire

62073536
>>62073532

sure thing sweaty

62073566
>>62073360
Filter it i do aswell.

62073574
>>62073566
You can't filter reality anon

62073587
>>62073574
Your threads are not reality. You likely make threads on home ownership too you silly billy

62073592
why do neoliberal drones try to larp as edgy, it will never work. You don't belong on 4chin, get the fuck off

62073609
>>62073566
I filter it but these stupid retards sometimes don't use the phrase "tick tock wagie" and i have to suffer these uninspired stale attempts of humour

62073610
>>62073368
Its mostly unemployed zoomers with nothing that make these threads
>inb4 some retard tells me he made 6 gorillion dollars rugging $BBC

62073622
>>62073349

Before she met bezos and went full bogged she was quite pretty. She was a weather girl in LA and she would wear the tightest dresses imaginable. Now she looks like some freak.

62073629
>>62073360
I like those jokes tho

62073654
>>62073629
I liked these jokes too but I grew tired of this meme stagflagtion. Years go by, stupid threads remain, and nothing happens

62074305
>>62073360
Sounds like someone didn't get the promotion

62074418
>>62073323
8am. Normal working hours are 8am-5pm now. 1hr unpaid lunch (eat at your desk and work through it or you're fired).

62074480
>>62073323
>i i its Friday, Mr. Bezos

62074488
>>62073609
Needs a filter. What a KEK.

62074490

Female hits wall, goes crazy. Tale as old as time.

62078079
That extra day off is only going to make the dread sting harder come Tuesday, wagie

62078090

62078096
>>62073360
You lost tranny

>>62076978
the bored ape looks heartbroken that its value dropped so much, kek

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 243 replies — 183.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 243 • Updated: 2026-04-05 02:49 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62056570
>>62051763
>>62049654
>>62048939
>>62048708
>>62045442
Here you go. Let me influence you young Vishnus of the mindchain; https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg4P23PirgU
DOT will become the Web3 cloud. It'll literally be able to do work for ETH, which means it'll be able to scale ETH to millions of TPS. ETH will be able to forward transactions to DOT and DOT will be able to execute them for ETH therefore scaling ETH to millions of TPS. DOT will be able to do that for any arbitrary project (not sure about stuff like BTC and DOGE that has no smart contracts. Maybe that too, yet I can't comment on that because I really don't know at this point).

62056612
>>62056570
>DOT will become the Web3 cloud. It'll literally be able to do work for ETH, which means it'll be able to scale ETH to millions of TPS. ETH will be able to forward transactions to DOT and DOT will be able to execute them for ETH therefore scaling ETH to millions of TPS. DOT will be able to do that for any arbitrary project (not sure about stuff like BTC and DOGE that has no smart contracts. Maybe that too, yet I can't comment on that because I really don't know at this point).
This is JUST one of the possible applications. Of course you'll be able to execute ANY arbitrary operation on-chain, like any Web2 cloud can. Imagine a WHOLE GAME deployed on-chain. Literally every step of your character, every emote, every chat message, every loot drop and pick up being on-chain. You'll of course also be able to run AI agents and shit like that... DOT is the ONLY chain capable of doing MILLIONS of TPS once NOMT + JAM get implemented
NOMT alone will x10 the throughput of the whole DOT chain. https://www.rob.tech/blog/introducing-nomt/ and https://github.com/thrumdev/nomt and https://www.reddit.com/r/Polkadot/comments/1nzjhuq/what_has_happened_to_nomt/ and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N3BX2eTqpro

So what's getting shipped this year that's considered "influential" for out young Vishnus of the mindchain? JAM, NOMT, the Polkadot App and more stuff (instant unstaking (unstaking will go from 28 days do 1-2 days)), project individuality (proof of personhood that doesn't require KYC, 500ms block (Basti blocks), and more)

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62056623
How do I buy this shit and how long do I hold

62056631
When will you incels realize shitcoins only go up if bitcoin goes up, it doesn’t matter how much ‘bullish’ news a shitcoin gets

62056642
>>62056623
What do you mean "How do I buy this shit"? Bro, if this comes of as mean, it's not meant as mean and I'm sorry if it sounds mean. If you can't figure out how to buy something yourself then please just don't buy it at all. Make yourself a favor

>>62056631
You do realize that this won't be true forever? And that certain projects do decouple from BTC when they're ripe for it.

62056686
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg4P23PirgU

Oliver makes a really good point here where he tries to point out that like 4 years ago L2s could just exist and people would use them and NOW people are demanding that the L2s upgrade and improve in order to still be considered useful. At this point I would like to add an additional thing. The thing that people want from major L2s (like Arbitrum and AVAX and other stuff like that) is what DOT L2s already have. The major L2s can't compete with DOT because they're behind and once JAM hits they'll be even more behind. In the time DOT gets JAM the L2s won't even have what DOT has RIGHT NOW. DOT has shared security, it has built-in native SAFE bridging (that's not even a bridge, it's a XCM, it uses HRMP channels), because of the shared security it DOES NOT fragment liquidity, you can use the functionality of ANOTHER chain on DOT (so of other DOT chains and other chains in general that aren't on DOT). Once people realize that they can EASILY build on DOT while every other chains LIMITS them in some shape or form they'll start flocking to DOT. Every other chain has a ton of problems that DOT simply DOES NOT therefore DOT is technologically speaking superior. Sooner or later the developers will catch onto it and start developing on DOT since the other chains have limited capabilities. You can only develop humdrum applications on ETH, no innovation will ever come out of ETH ever again. ETH is obselete and unreconcilable. Sure it'll stay relevant for a few more year but how much longer can it stand the test of time? BTC is windows 1.0, ETH is windows 98, DOT is Windows 12 lol (Yes, not Windows 11, it's windows 12).

62056998
>>62056631
The game is changing. This bear market will prove it

62057110
>>62056998
>The game is changing.
What do you see anon? Help us understand what you see when you say "The game is changing". And yes, I do agree that stuff will shift from stupidity back to usability. So, meme coins were the LAST DROP. Enough is ENOUGH. We need to go back to our roots and invest into stuff that actually makes sense and is GROUND BREAKING. If we don't pivot in this liminal time then the industry as a whole will be finished for like 10-20 years UNTIL we pivot there is no way forward. We need to REALIZE that BTC is crap, ETH is crap, SOL is crap, USDT is centralized shit, XRP is useless, TRX is a cult run piece of shit, lol BCH is in the top 10 WTF, DOGE is crap, BNB is fucking crap. It's all just useless junk. Literally the whole of top 10 is fucking garbage that's unusable. It's literally all Windows 1 and Windows 98 type of coins while we already have the Vishnu of the mindchain, the Windows 12 of blockchains, the collectibe 1/9 Lamborghini Veneno Roadster of the blockchain, the fucking Rolls-Royce of the blockchain industry, and we're still stuck with the fucking Windows 1 and Windows 98 of the blockchain industry. Guys, it's time for FUCKING CHANGE. Either we pivot to the 3rd generation blockchains or the whole sector will GO UNDER for a decade or two. Do you want to suck cock for 10 to 20 years? Or do you just market sell your garbage gen 1 and gen 2 tokens/coins and move on with your life and buy the actual technical innovation? It's choice time and it's GOOD to know that any day you can change your whole fucking life. If you want the world to change then the first step to changing the world is to CHANGE YOUR FUCKING SELF. You only need to 1. WANT THE CHANGE and 2. BELIEVE YOU CAN CHANGE (Self-efficacy). Those are the 2 most important principles of BEHAVIOURAL CHANGE. Change your behaviour and with that you'll change the world. Sure it'll take time and effort but hey, even wallowing in your misery, being depressed takes time and effort.

62058962
>>62056631
Algorand is pumping while Bitcoin is dumping because it is quantum secure. Nigger

62059225
DOT will reach the $1.60 range before this week ends

62059268
>>62057110
See was that so hard on being influential?

62060540
>>62059268
The thing is, that "influenced" you... Doesn't mean it influenced the other people. Everyone is a unique little program and therefore needs unique inputs in order to produce the desired output. One man's trash is another man's treasure

>>62058962
Nagger

62060621
100$ end of the FUCKING bull run. Here's some influential and intellectual insights

62060648
>>62060540
How do you know. Besides the intent of you making this thread was to educate/shill/ influence the mass retards on this site, don't try to convince me otherwise

62062169
>>62060648
>How do you know.
What do you mean by that? How do I know what?

62062500
>>62060648
How I know that people are unique little programs and that I need to input unique inputs to get the desired outputs? Is that what you're asking or?

62062550
Let me "influence" you young Vishnus of the MINDchain. Listen to one of our spiritual leaders Oliver Talé-Yaźdi how he talks about the Vishnu mindchain. Join our cult *kmh* *kmh* web3 organization where we talk about the new world order.

https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2039256751346700502

62065568
100$ end of MIND RUN

62068446
12 more hours and the thread will be alive for 30 days and that's when Gavin Wood gives me 11.5k DOT for my "influencing" of your young Vishnus of the mindchain.

62068604
i buy this shit at 6.6$ or -75% from ATH
NOW I M AT -90% DOWN

62068658
>>62068604
yeah the decline of this shit has been remarkable. and it still somehow has a $2 billion market cap.

62069192
>>62068658
im very disappointed

62069282
>>62069192
Good. Now sell so I can GIGA short it some more while shilling it on 4chan. You activated my trap card anon "Backstabbing shill" (Effect: Convince people DOT is THE SOLUTION while having a giga short open at the same time).

62071796
100$ end of bull run. And it's official, the thread has stayed alive for 30 days and therefore Gavin Wood will pay me 11.5k$. That will feed Mumbai for literally a whole year.

Thank you Vishnu

62072073
>>62071796
You're welcome.

Don't I get a little something

62073144
>>62072073
But of course Panjali, your are a citizen of Mumbai city, the city of DOT. Every citizen gets paid. We all get feed and loved by our kind lord Gavin Wood. He is the underworld CP kingpin. He sells Cheese Pizza and then redistributes the funds among DOT holders. Everyone in Mumbai is eating and licking Cheese Pizza. I also like to put some cream onto my Cheese Pizza and then lick it off.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62075463
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62077075
Every day after the 30th day I get 150 DOT as a bonus. If we keep the thread alive for 30 more days I'll get 30 * 150 = 4500 more DOT. Please help contribute so my village of Mumbai gets feed.

62078039
>>62077075

62078216
>>62078039

item.title: The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. — 61 replies — 30.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016.

Open thread • Replies: 61 • Updated: 2026-04-05 02:07 UTC

OP

The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. It's 39% now.

Early replies (first 3)

62074981
>>62074965
lol no, the financial bust part is the great depression, the revolution and wars is the period between the end of ww2 and 2008, debt and restructuring was 2008 onwards

62074987
Seems like a silly unfounded chart given that gold were the main reserves before the dollar.

62075007
>>62074981
>the revolution and wars is the period between the end of ww2 and 1971, debt and restructuring was 1971 to 2008(2020 maybe?), new world order from then on

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62075725
>>62075578
Agreed, and you need a shitton of batteries to counter that. Good thing China isn't the number one producer of batteries right?

62075745
>>62075676
>batteries
lol — batteries no matter how far they come they have a half time life and the production and energy generation costs to half life are retarded, and will always be retarded. Its okay for the consumer market, its not something you run an industrialized economy with.

An that isnt even the worst issue. You clearly don't know how an electrical grid works. The discrepancy between offer and demand cannot exceed 0.5Hz. If it does, to the upside the net fries, if it does to the down side the net browns out. Game over. Now tell me, how does one regulate the offer to match the demand with a silicon panels on which the sun shines in various degrees over the entire day? You cant. A cloud and you are fucked. Thats why even a fucking wood powered steam engine is still superior to a solar panel. If demand exceeds offer, throw on more steam engines, if the demand is lower than the offer, shut some steam engines down - the grid stays happy, electricity flows
You cant really do that with solar panels

There is only one place where solar panels makes sense, in an orbit in space, and no, you cant just put a cable from space to earth, the loss is retarded
>>62075678
>Geography doesn't matter
There is no point in communicating with you

62075752
>>62074981
>financial bust part is the great depression
You're right but that was the last cycle not the current one. We already had a new world order after the great depression and that world is quickly coming to an end. The upside for those prepared is a rare opportunity to enter into the upper echelons.

62075758
>>62075725
Batteries are okay for a consumer market. It ensures a demand BECASUE those shit devices die fairly regular and fast. You don't run an industry on fucking batteries

62075825
>>62075745
That's ok buddy you can continue your autistic belief that mountains conquer markets

62075897
>>62075140
Don’t bother, these negative retards can’t understand the strength of soft power.

62075904
>>62075286
>overt negativity and a weird positivity towards russia

Kek some people can’t help but to be contrarian.

62075906
>>62075897
EU is filled with infighting and requiring a consensus, there's no way it can be a power.

62075932
>>62075906
Europeans now understand that either we work together or face irrelevancy and being raped by other powers. There will be a lot less infighting in the future.

62076103
>>62075752

62076183
>>62075897

62076222
>>62074965
I voted for this

62076517
>>62075745
Jesus you are really retarded. You know batteries can be recycled right??

62076522
>>62076103

62076525
>>62075897

62076528
>>62075897

South Korea has more soft power than all the EU countries combined. And if they unite with NK, they'll have more hard power too

62076535
>>62074965

62076539
>>62076528

62076546
>>62076539

62076552

62076603
>>62076546
There are people all over the planet speaking English and French, for one example. Let's count how many countries South Korea can say the same for. I'll start.

1. South Korea.

62077033
>>62076103

62077390
>>62076517
>please believe my scam
>an industrialized territory with electricity demand in the Terra Watts is totally going to run on batteries and solar
>y-you can recycle the material from LIBs
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAAHHAAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAHAHHAHAHAHAHHAHAHHAHAHAHAHHAHAHHAHAH

62077408
>>62076552
>still trying to run the "right wing" left libtardian etatist scapegoat
Did it work over the past 20 years or did it ironically had a Streisand effect to call everyone that isnt your close etatistic epistemic community a "national SOCIALIS 'right winger' "

Yeah thought so, keep a cyanide capsule close to you at all time, in July the first bond auctions fail in probably France, Italy or Japan and the collapse is going to end your fantasy

62077415
>>62074987
And gold has now surpassed the dollar as international reserve asset.

62077421
>>62077415
and? A shovel to your head and your gold stack changed the owner. There is only one universal currency among humans, its violence and the state only has mercenaries, with the state as a concept being bankrupt.

Mercenaries are great in peace times, in times of stress they are the ones ending the Prince

62077847
>>62077390
>bro I learned about solar and batteries in the 80’s. It MUST be the same ok?

The absolute state

62077968
>>62077847
You can spew the marketing shit as much as you like, LIB+solar is not going to run an industrialized economy.
>b-but china
no. China is as good as dead if it doesn't either sucks uncle sams dick real good, or invades Siberia and Kamchatka

62078052
>>62076603
England isn't even in EU dumbo

>>62077421
The absolute delusion in this thread lmao

62078161
>>62077968

62072352

62072624

62072648
>>62067548

62072652

How dumb are you.

62072852
>>62067548

To think this type of idiot was an exec at Yahoo! during the downfall.
XRP is a grift through and through.

62072861
>>62072712

62076077
>>62067548

62076450
>>62067548

62076468
>>62067548

62077614
>>62067548
The Chad Brad vs. the virgin emaciated ghost of a 16th century peasant boy

62077616
>>62072624
>>62072712
Called this. He watched the DLT evolution incubate and come and develop and built out and now finally crystalize in final products used at large with plugins to 10s of thousands of banks and all he could come up with was GPI as a way to very moderately modernize fax machine era messaging tech and CCIP which is slow and expensive as fuck and injects middleman jew friction into services other products don't and presumes the reliance on consortium trust in a tech era that is automating the benefits the trust gave to insulate from bad actors, literally rendering them obsolete increasingly through time. It is AMAZING how much he missed the ball and how much weird specific communities still clung to him because he was /their guy/. He expected the Warrenite financialist cartel to triumph legally over crypto and leave it illegal or regulated into unusability and massively lost and made ZERO plans for alternative cases or backups. Now he is either being fired for doing WAY too little WAY too late or jumping ship because he realizes or always knew this and is looking to benefit elsewhere. He literally did what the best possible case would be for someone who hired him to make sure SWIFT missed the ball and failed and was left in the technologic smart dust. He is either the biggest idiot boomer in tech possibly literally in industrial history or he is a snake in the grass looking to cash in on a pre-arranged hire. Either way SWIFT is COOKED and it is EXTREMELY awesome to see because they are a corporatist hell organization.

62077891
>>62072861
Tell the class, in your words, what you think it means

62078150
>>62077616

item.title: It’s all falling apart — 123 replies — 8.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
It’s all falling apart

Open thread • Replies: 123 • Updated: 2026-04-04 14:00 UTC

OP

At the same time. Bonds dumping, oil spiking, equities crashing

Trump is gonna go down as a worse version of Hoover + LBJ lol

Early replies (first 3)

62068038
>>>/pol/
Trump is not a king
Neither is he responsible for 80 years of BoomerX fuck ups

62068047
>>62068035
it's over

62068065
>>62068038

But he is the closest American president to a king, and the reason we are in this shitshow now. Spiking oil from 60 to 120 in a month is going to rally yields which are going to tighten financial conditions across the country

Tariffs are managed by the legislative, not the executive, but they didn’t stop king Cheeto from wasting a year and dumping markets 20% for being wrong

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62069679
>>62069672
Impossible with 70 years of uncovered ponzi scheming by communists. Again, you cannot hide yourself behind Trump, your fuck ups are not going to be memory holed, you are not going to rise from the ashes and suddenly larp as the adults in the room. The nooses are prepared

62069832
>>62069679
>Impossible with 70 years of uncovered ponzi scheming by communists
I dunno, I think that makes it even easier since you identify all the fraud that ends up being the majority of the deficit spending and then cut it.

62069836
>>62069346
Michigan did the same with nursing homes my Grandmother died of covid after they moved in covid faggots.

62069867
>>62069832
Well it was tried. No matter how much I personally dislike the GenX fag Melon, credit where credit is due trying to root out some scams. But in the end its trying to fix a pipe in a house that is already completely water damaged. Its better to completely demolish it, which means total default.

And again, Trump is just the poor bastard that holds the hot potato that is going to deterministically explode, its ultimately the fault and the generational guilt of GenX, Boomers, Silent Gen and greatest gen, with the latter unfortunately already dead, as their entire set of representatives and "economic" actors that failed for 40 years straight to fix the water damage and instead opened every single tab in the house.

The hate won't go away and its a justified hate, because those bastard generations as a collective imposed a generational contract on those that weren't even born when they scammed. There is only one justified morally and ethically correct way to handle the fuck ups of these generations, genocide. No way around, no mercy. They did not know mercy when they put my name on the deed

62069868
>>62068035
N.E.H

62070088
>>62068437
Amen

62070189
>>62069671

bootlickers like this suck the best cock

62070263
>>62070189
[shill blank]
lol

62070285
The AOC 49 state sweep is going to be a brutal redpill for this country.

62070374
>>62070285
Just because the right is mad at Trump does not mean that they're suddenly going to vote for democrats.

62070388
>>62070374
correct. That's the funny part about demrat shills. They are currently dumping Billions in dollars into eroding the trust in the "state" on such a fundamental level and expecting for some reason that it is going to give them voter potential, when in fact it is just priming the population to go complete 1789 on the entire polity, no matter what flag they fly

62070448
>>62068035
that was always the point, distracting you with manufactured culture wars and financed talking heads while the establishment pulls the plug amidst managed chaos

thanks for playing

62071104
>>62068148
>tariffs (power of purse to congress)
delegated to the president centuries ago
>Iran war (power to declare war to congress)
Delegated to the president nearly a century ago, but the Iraq war involves the Navy and Air Forces, neither of which have ever been subject to congressional declarations of war. The first two barbary wars were fought by the US Navy without a declaration of war by congress, and literally no peeps were made about their constitutionality *by the people who wrote the constitution*. So fuck off with your bullshit.
>threatens to sue political opponents
Oh no not the president that was literally sued by his political opponents! How very gauche of him.
>threatens to sue federal reserve for not lowering rates like we are some 3rd world shithole like turkey
The federal reserve is a patently unconstitutional breach of constutitional executive authority. He should just shut it down.
>fights Supreme Court on tariffs and refuses to refund despite them saying he’s wrong
Separation of powers, bitch. The USSC is not a superior branch to the Administrative.
>uses his military police to literally kill American citizens (ICE)
Oh no police have never killed american citizens before. Perhaps they shouldn't have attempted to murder the ICE officers.
>Donald J. Trump signed 252 Executive orders between 2025 and 2026.
So you're seriously claiming that the president cannot direct the operations of his own executive branch? Because that's what an executive order is, it's an order to the executive branch. That's all it is. It isn't legislation, and you're a fucking retard for thinking it is, or you are just being a lying piece of shit who thinks we are all fucking retards that will fall for it.

62071127
>>62068374
The terms of Article 5 are satisfied by hopes and prayers and warm thoughts. Nobody would care if Estonia did it, but if the US does it then NATO effectively ceases to exist. Oh the piece of paper that the treaty is written on would still exist, and the French and Germans would parade around with their 6 working tanks and half an infantry division between them, for all anybody cares.

62071151
>>62068035
it's just money. they've got a money printer they use regularly for this.

62071160
>>62070448
absolutely. boomer wealth was always going to be fleeced. always.

62071162
>>62070374
They won't vote Democrat. They will vote AOC 2028

62071169
>>62068035
ever!
impossible!
earth shattering!
people asking for their money back is a revolution on par with spitting of the atom.

62071178
>>62071162
Go back to to your shitcord /tv/ clown shill

62071284
>>62068038
Trump was born in 1946 and has been fucking up our society since the beginning with the rest of the boomers. 1946 is the literal leading edge of the boomer generation, retard.

62071296
>>62071162
Unironically Tulsi 2028 if she ends up getting fired.

62071370
>>62071284
Sure, he is a Boomer, and that qualifies him to hang on the same noose BUT it does not mean that the rest of the BoomerX and more important the rest of the polity, bureaucracy, subsidized privates, bankers.... can hide behind him and memory hole themselves out of their guilt. He is not the scapegoat alone, that goes to everyone over 50 in the political sphere and close to it over the past 70 years, no exceptions

62072176
if you actually have any conviction try shorting blue owl, i’ll be happy to have you pay my dividend in may with your WORTHLESS short position.

62072205
>>62068713
>left liberal communist
schizo word salad

62072344
>>62068038
>BoomerX

Is it just the one guy pushing this term?

62073037
>>62068065
>the closest American president to a king
That had been Obama so far by a margin.

62073045
>>62068038
Trump is a boomer and his love for Israel has put the final nail in the US coffin

62075826
>>62068035
good.

62076650
>>62073037
Your png says that was bush jr not Obama, you fucking idiot

62076688
>>62072344
I think so.

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-04-05 03:09 UTC

OP

62077832
>>62077773
it takes a person going through genuine psychosis to be holding ICP for this long

62077844
>>62077832
It's called conviction

62077845
>>62077832
I am down 75%. May as well hold to zero or moonshot

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62077946
>>62077832
We're all lunatics here holding our stupid imaginary bullshit

62078002
>>62077845
Why didnt you put in any stop losses, anon

62078104
>>62078002
I am a big time degen gambler. I don’t care it is what it is. You win some you lose some, but I haven’t lost yet because I haven’t sold yet.

62078225
>>62077845
>>62078104
How many pees you got bro? I just acoomulated 12k (my average is like $5 though kek). Wagmi pisschads

62078240
>>62078225
Only ~10k, average is $7.40. I could ape in and quadruple my stack but I am too cowardly

item.title: Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum? — 9 replies — 5.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum?

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-04-05 02:30 UTC

OP

Did you guys see that just recently HEX became the 3rd most held token on all of Ethereum?
Only behind USDC and Tether

Does this give it more legitimacy or will most see through this mass marketing dust campaign?
Either way, it's not cheap to send your coin to 5 million people in a shill campaign.....

Early replies (first 3)

62077138
>>62077135
its totally legit saar, ape in lifesavings!

62077151
read pic
I bca finding out which "wrong-talk" did I type that our janitor is malding over

62077172
>>62077151
Airdropping a fresh coin would mess everything up, so if you're going to fork it anyways, why not make a new chain where the ETH FagFoundation can't make another update that fucks it all up with higher fees?

I agree there is a lot of hate-marketing out there giving bad optics, so many twitter accounts hating and shitting on RH and his coins daily and you just know it's all fueled by rage over their bags they're down bad on

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62077902
fuck off heart you gangster fuck

62077984
>>62077902
how is it so hard to find him? hes literally in estonia and probably hits up the luxury stores once a week lol

62078130
>>62077984
When X enabled location info for profiles last year his account showed south east asia.

>>62077902
fake news, all assault charges have been dropped
it was quite possibly completely made up just to get him on the interpol list since you can't be on there for non-violent crimes.

62078173
>>62077135
What’s the difference between pHEX, eHEX and HEX in ethereum? I can’t tell you because idgaf I’m all in pDAI niggers

62078189
>>62077172
>why not make a new chain where the ETH FagFoundation can't make another update that fucks it all up with higher fees?
because you're overcomplicating the project which was supposed to be pure game-theory of stakers vs LPers/ traders

now you have a shitshow that sent this to a -99% death chart
it's dead because of it

>Airdropping a fresh coin would mess everything up
it would mess NOTHING up
hex was an airdrop to bitcoin holders in the first place

62078192
>>62078173
see
this is what I mean
now you have the pDAI shitshow
you have pHEX, eHEX, pulseX
it's a fucking circus

richard fucking failed because he didn't listen to his own advice
